title: alchemilla vulgaris var. fissimima
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. fissimima, commonly known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial flowering plant species within the genus Alchemilla. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and ascorbic acid. The medicinal properties of the lady's mantle are said to provide various health benefits, including wound healing, soothing digestive issues, and reducing menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
